(NYSE: CCS), a leading homebuilder, is behind this project known for its online home sales. The community is gaining attention for its affordability and prime location.

news.headline: Fractal Antenna Systems unveils new technology to disable drones using sound waves, inducing vibrations leading to flight failure.
news.summary: In Bedford, Massachusetts, Fractal Antenna Systems, Inc. has introduced a groundbreaking technology called Acoustic Resonance Mitigation (ARM), which is designed to neutralize drones using targeted acoustic energy. ARM functions by projecting sonic, ultrasonic, and/or subsonic frequencies towards a drone, creating vibrations and potential Prandtl layer destabilization that can result in flight malfunctions. This technology is particularly effective against drone propeller blades, as it can induce turbulence or transfer vibrations to the Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), ultimately leading to flight disruption.

BGL sells MakoRabco to Trachte Building Systems, a leader in self-storage construction solutions.
news.summary: A prominent construction solutions provider in the self-storage sector headquartered in Cleveland, announced the successful sale of MakoRabco. news.headline: Report on measuring social impact released by TCC Group and M&E CoP, highlighting business reluctance to invest in impact metrics.
news.summary: The release of the 2025 benchmarking report by TCC Group and The Corporate Measurement & Evaluation Community of Practice highlights the growing importance of impact metrics in today's business landscape. Despite this, many companies are not prioritizing investments in this area. The report, released in New York on March 27, 2025, emphasizes the need for companies to recognize the significance of impact metrics as the new currency in business. This underscores the crucial role such metrics play in assessing performance and driving business growth.

news.headline: Wall Street down as auto tariffs hit GM, Ford; Trump announced a 25% tariff on all auto imports, causing GM to plunge 6.5%, as Tesla rose 2.6% and Rivian jumped 5%.
news.summary: Wall Street saw a slight decline on Thursday as President Donald Trump's announcement of a 25% tariff on all auto imports next week impacted the market. This decision also included duties on auto parts in May. European automakers like Mercedes-Benz Group AG (OTCPK: MBGAF) and Porsche Automobile Holding SE (OTCPK: POAHF) experienced drops of 2.5% and 5% respectively. Michigan-based carmakers were also affected, with Ford Motor Co. (NYSE:F) falling 2.5% and General Motors Co. (NYSE:GM) plunging 6.5%, making it the worst performer on the S&P 500. However, U.S. electric vehicle makers such as Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) and Rivian Automotive Inc. (NASDAQ:RIVN) rallied, with Tesla rising 2.6% and Rivian jumping 5%. The positive movement in these stocks followed comments from Goldman Sachs analyst Mark Delenay.

news.headline: Trump and Canadian prime minister Carney held their first call today - sources.
Global celebration of International Jazz Day 2025 in Abu Dhabi, UNESCO Creative City of Music, in 190+ countries on April 30.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, it was announced that the upcoming International Jazz Day in 2025 will be commemorated in over 190 nations on April 30, with Abu Dhabi being designated as the Global Host City. The event is being coordinated by UNESCO and the Herbie Hancock Institute of Jazz.

news.headline: Market rebounds after Trump's tariff news; auto stocks hit hard, Nasdaq and Dow Jones recover. Broadcom triggers sell rule.
news.summary: Following the announcement of new tariffs by President Trump, buyers reentered the market after initial index drops. Auto stocks experienced significant declines, leading to a sell rule being activated by Broadcom. The Dow Jones and Nasdaq managed to recover from early losses caused by the tariff news. This information signals defensive actions for Broadcom investors.

This move follows a recent announcement where GEICO disclosed intentions to add 500 jobs, ultimately contributing more than 1,500 jobs to the region. The expansion is driven by the company's success in attracting top talent in North Texas, prompting its growth across various sectors.

news.headline: Inventor from Brogue, Pa introduces BUCHANAN BUCKET - a new type of mop bucket (MBQ-648) to improve cleaning tasks.

news.headline: Jace Wolfe, Ph.D., CCC-A awarded Marion Downs Award for Excellence in Pediatric Audiology for significant contributions.

His work has significantly influenced the profession. Dr. Wolfe, who holds a Ph.D. and CCC-A, serves as the Senior Vice President of Innovation at Oberkotter.

news.headline: Q4 2024 GDP revised to 2.4%, slight growth from 2.3%. Concerns for Q1, experts warn of potential negative growth.
news.summary: Wall Street saw a positive turn with the Bureau of Economic Analysis revising the US Gross Domestic Product growth for the fourth quarter of 2024. The economy showed growth at an annualized rate of 2.4%, slightly up from the previous estimate of 2.3%. This growth was a deceleration compared to the 3.1% observed in the third quarter. The increase in real GDP was mainly fueled by higher consumer and government spending, although this was partly offset by a drop in investment. Imports also decreased, impacting GDP calculations negatively. Experts are cautious about future GDP estimates due to the impacts of new trade policies. The general consensus is that the US economy remained robust at the close of 2024.

news.headline: Standard Wellness relocates cannabis pharmacy to Murray, Utah, improving accessibility for Salt Lake County's medical marijuana patients.

news.headline: Dahsheng Chemical marks 80th anniversary by launching DURAPONTEX eN35 insole for high-impact sports, providing unmatched cushioning and rebound.

news.headline: Innovator creates 180 CURVE toothbrush to prevent back pain while brushing; addresses bending issue.

This innovation aims to alleviate back pain by eliminating the requirement to bend the arm or head while brushing. The inventor highlighted that the 180 CURVE offers a solution to this issue, potentially benefiting many users. The unique design of this toothbrush showcases a new approach to oral hygiene, marking a breakthrough in brushing comfort.

news.headline: 'Ghiblification' AI trend boosts GHIBLI Solana meme coin with Studio Ghibli-inspired AI images.

news.headline: Gold prices rise over 1%; TD SYNNEX shares plummet 18% after missing revenue expectations. Dow drops 90 points, stands at 42,358.68.
news.summary: U.S. stocks experienced a decline in midday trading, with the Dow Jones index dropping approximately 90 points on Thursday. The Dow was down by 0.23% to 42,358.68, while the NASDAQ fell by 0.05% to 17,890.40. The S&P 500 also saw a decrease, dropping by 0.04% to 5,709.99. Consumer discretionary shares were a notable gainer, jumping by 1.2%, while information technology shares fell by 0.3%. TD SYNNEX Corp (NYSE:SNX) saw its shares dip by around 18% after reporting first-quarter results, with quarterly revenue of $14.53 billion (up 4.0% year over year) missing analyst expectations. The company reported an adjusted EPS of $2.80, below the street view of $2.91. On a positive note, Soleno Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:SLNO) witnessed a 41% surge in its shares to $69.22 following FDA approval for its latest product.

news.headline: Cegedim's 2024 results show revenue of €654.5 million, a 6.3% increase. Operating profitability improved, with recurring operating income up 24.7% to €39.5 million.
news.summary: Cegedim, a company based in France, reported improved financial performance for the year 2024. Revenues increased by 6.3% to €654.5 million, with recurring operating income rising by 24.7% to €39.5 million. The recurring operating margin also improved to 6.0% in 2024 from 5.1% in 2023. The positive results were driven by improved profitability in insurance businesses, especially in Software and BPO services, along with growth in Cegedim Business Services in Human Resources and digitalized flow services. The company also reported growth in various divisions like Software & Services, Flow, Data & Marketing, BPO, and Cloud & Support. Despite some expenses related to non-recurring items and financial losses, Cegedim managed to enhance its overall financial performance in 2024.
